calendar.matters:
SMALL CLAIMS APPEAL NOTICE OF TIME AND PLACE
Off Calendar Feb-15-2023 Set For Trial On Feb-15-23 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 305

SMALL CLAIM APPEALS
Off Calendar Feb-15-2023 Continued To Feb-15-23 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 206

SMALL CLAIM APPEALS
Off Calendar Feb-17-2023 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES: Appearances:
Gayle Hart, Appellant/Defendant
Witness Devin Wilson is present.
Maria Johnson, Respondent/Plaintiff

This cause comes on regularly for trial de novo. All parties and witnesses are sworn.

Maria Johnson, Respondent/Plaintiff testifies on her own behalf.
Witness Devin Wilson testifies.
The following documentary evidence is introduced:
Respondent's Exhibit #1: Packet of statements and text messages

Gayle Hart, Appellant/Defendant testifies on her own behalf.

The following documentary evidence is introduced:
Appellant's Exhibit A: Packet of billing statements from Golden State Warriors and text messages.

Both parties present additional arguments.
All exhibits are retained by the Court.

At the conclusion of the hearing, the matter is taken under submission. The Court informs the parties she will send out a decision within the week.

Judge: Mary E. Wiss, Clerk: R. Gumpal. Not Reported, (305) Matter is heard in Dept 210.

PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM
Off Calendar Dec-28-2022 Judgment Entered
